metrics.method_citation: Wilson, E. B. (1927). Probable inference, the law of succession, and statistical inference. JASA 22(158):209-212.
metrics.formula: p_hat = passes/n; CI = Wilson score interval at 95%

failure_modes.description: n<30; CI width may exceed 10 percentage points
Wilson assumes independent Bernoulli trials. Scenarios in the same run share infrastructure (same VM, same kernel, same network) and are not independent. CI may undercount.
A scenario that passes intermittently inflates pass-rate even when a real regression is present
